title: callista angulata
intro: Callista angulata, also known as the "Australian haresfoot," is a flowering plant native to Australia and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Callista angulata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Callista angulata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
